    60→
    61→
    62→def _get_snapshot_result(
    63→    *,
    64→    session_id: str,
    65→    plan_file: Path | None,
    66→    cwd: Path,
    67→    claude_installation: ClaudeInstallation,
    68→    repo_root: Path,
    69→) -> PlanSnapshot | None:
    70→    """Archive the plan file to session-scoped scratch storage.
    71→
    72→    Plan snapshots preserve the original plan content at save time, creating
    73→    an immutable record tied to the session. This enables deduplication
    74→    (detecting if a session already saved a plan) and provides an audit trail
    75→    (what was the plan content when it was saved).
    76→
    77→    Args:
    78→        session_id: Claude session ID
    79→        plan_file: Explicit plan file path (highest priority)
    80→        cwd: Current working directory
    81→        claude_installation: ClaudeInstallation gateway for plan discovery
    82→        repo_root: Repository root for scratch directory
    83→
    84→    Returns:
    85→        PlanSnapshot with archive path, or None if no plan file found.
    86→    """
    87→    if plan_file is not None:
    88→        snapshot_path = plan_file
    89→    else:
    90→        snapshot_path = claude_installation.find_plan_for_session(cwd, session_id)
    91→
    92→    if snapshot_path is None or not snapshot_path.exists():
    93→        return None
    94→
    95→    return snapshot_plan_for_session(
    96→        session_id=session_id,
    97→        plan_file_path=snapshot_path,
    98→        project_cwd=cwd,
    99→        claude_installation=claude_installation,
   100→        repo_root=repo_root,
   101→    )
   102→
   103→
   104→def _save_as_planned_pr(
   105→    ctx: click.Context,
   106→    *,
   107→    plan_content: str,
   108→    session_id: str | None,
   109→    objective_issue: int | None,
   110→    plan_type: str | None,
   111→    output_format: str,
   112→    plan_file: Path | None,
   113→    learned_from_issue: int | None,
   114→    created_from_workflow_run_url: str | None,
   115→    branch_slug: str | None,
   116→) -> None:
   117→    """Save plan as a planned PR.
   118→
   119→    Creates a branch, pushes it, then creates a planned PR with plan content.
   120→
   121→    Args:
   122→        ctx: Click context
   123→        plan_content: Validated plan content
   124→        session_id: Session ID for markers
   125→        objective_issue: Optional objective issue number
   126→        plan_type: Plan type (standard or learn)
   127→        output_format: Output format (json or display)
   128→        plan_file: Original plan file path (for snapshot)
   129→        learned_from_issue: Parent plan issue number (for learn plans)
   130→        created_from_workflow_run_url: GitHub Actions workflow run URL
   131→        branch_slug: Pre-generated branch slug (skips LLM call when provided)
   132→    """
   133→    repo_root = require_repo_root(ctx)
   134→    cwd = require_cwd(ctx)
   135→    git = require_git(ctx)
   136→    github = require_github(ctx)
   137→    github_issues = require_issues(ctx)
   138→    config = require_local_config(ctx)
   139→    claude_installation = require_claude_installation(ctx)
   140→
   141→    title = extract_title_from_plan(plan_content)
   142→
   143→    # Validate plan title before proceeding
   144→    title_validation = validate_plan_title(title)
   145→    if isinstance(title_validation, InvalidPlanTitle):
   146→        if output_format == "display":
   147→            click.echo(f"Error: {title_validation.message}", err=True)
   148→        else:
   149→            click.echo(
   150→                json.dumps(
   151→                    {
   152→                        "success": False,
   153→                        "error": f"Plan title validation failed: {title_validation.reason}",
   154→                        "error_type": "validation_failed",
   155→                        "agent_guidance": title_validation.message,
   156→                    }
   157→                )
   158→            )
   159→        raise SystemExit(2)
   160→
   161→    if not branch_slug:
   162→        click.echo(
   163→            "Error: --branch-slug is required. "
   164→            "Generate a slug in the calling skill (e.g., plan-save.md Step 1.5) "
   165→            "and pass it via --branch-slug.",
   166→            err=True,
   167→        )
   168→        raise SystemExit(1)
   169→    slug = branch_slug
   170→    now = require_time(ctx).now()
   171→    branch_name = generate_planned_pr_branch_name(
   172→        slug,
   173→        now,
   174→        objective_id=objective_issue,
   175→    )
   176→
   177→    # Determine base branch: use current branch if on a feature branch, otherwise trunk
   178→    branch_manager = require_branch_manager(ctx)
   179→    trunk = git.branch.detect_trunk_branch(repo_root)
   180→    current_branch = git.branch.get_current_branch(repo_root)
   181→
   182→    if current_branch is not None and current_branch != trunk:
   183→        # Stack plan branch on current feature branch for natural Graphite stacking
   184→        base_branch = current_branch
   185→        create_result = branch_manager.create_branch(repo_root, branch_name, current_branch)
   186→    else:
   187→        # On trunk or detached HEAD: create from origin/trunk
   188→        base_branch = trunk
   189→        git.remote.fetch_branch(repo_root, "origin", trunk)
   190→        create_result = branch_manager.create_branch(repo_root, branch_name, f"origin/{trunk}")
   191→    if isinstance(create_result, BranchAlreadyExists):
   192→        click.echo(f"Error: {create_result.message}", err=True)
   193→        raise SystemExit(1) from None
   194→
   195→    # Build ref.json data
   196→    ref_data: dict[str, str | int | None] = {
   197→        "provider": "github-draft-pr",
   198→        "title": title,
   199→    }
   200→    if objective_issue is not None:
   201→        ref_data["objective_id"] = objective_issue
   202→
   203→    # Commit plan files directly to branch (no checkout needed).
   204→    # Uses git plumbing to avoid race conditions when multiple sessions
   205→    # share the same worktree.
   206→    git.commit.commit_files_to_branch(
   207→        repo_root,
   208→        branch=branch_name,
   209→        files={
   210→            f"{IMPL_CONTEXT_DIR}/plan.md": plan_content,
   211→            f"{IMPL_CONTEXT_DIR}/ref.json": json.dumps(ref_data, indent=2),
   212→        },
   213→        message=f"Add plan: {title}",
   214→    )
   215→    git.remote.push_to_remote(cwd, "origin", branch_name, set_upstream=True, force=False)
   216→
   217→    # Build metadata — base_ref_name sets the PR base ref
   218→    metadata: dict[str, object] = {"branch_name": branch_name, "base_ref_name": base_branch}
   219→
   220→    if config.plans_repo is not None:
   221→        metadata["source_repo"] = get_repo_identifier(ctx)
   222→
   223→    if objective_issue is not None:
   224→        metadata["objective_issue"] = objective_issue
   225→
   226→    if session_id is not None:
   227→        metadata["created_from_session"] = session_id
   228→
   229→    if learned_from_issue is not None:
   230→        metadata["learned_from_issue"] = learned_from_issue
   231→
   232→    if created_from_workflow_run_url is not None:
   233→        metadata["created_from_workflow_run_url"] = created_from_workflow_run_url
   234→
   235→    # Build labels
   236→    labels = ["erk-plan"]
   237→    if plan_type == "learn":
   238→        labels.append("erk-learn")
   239→
   240→    # Prefix title with [erk-plan] or [erk-learn] for GitHub visibility
   241→    title_tag = get_title_tag_from_labels(labels)
   242→    prefixed_title = f"{title_tag} {title}"
   243→
   244→    # Create draft PR via backend
   245→    backend = PlannedPRBackend(github, github_issues, time=RealTime())
   246→    result = backend.create_plan(
   247→        repo_root=repo_root,
   248→        title=prefixed_title,
   249→        content=plan_content,
   250→        labels=tuple(labels),
   251→        metadata=metadata,
   252→    )
   253→
   254→    if not result.plan_id.isdigit():
   255→        msg = f"Expected numeric plan_id from planned PR creation, got: {result.plan_id!r}"
   256→        raise RuntimeError(msg)
   257→    plan_number = int(result.plan_id)
   258→
   259→    # Create markers and snapshot
   260→    snapshot_result: PlanSnapshot | None = None
   261→    if session_id is not None:
   262→        create_plan_saved_marker(session_id, repo_root)
   263→        create_plan_saved_issue_marker(session_id, repo_root, plan_number)
   264→        create_plan_saved_branch_marker(session_id, repo_root, branch_name)
   265→
   266→        snapshot_result = _get_snapshot_result(
   267→            session_id=session_id,
   268→            plan_file=plan_file,
   269→            cwd=cwd,
   270→            claude_installation=claude_installation,
   271→            repo_root=repo_root,
   272→        )
   273→
   274→    # Output
   275→    if output_format == "display":
   276→        click.echo(f"Plan saved as planned PR #{plan_number}")
   277→        click.echo(f"Title: {prefixed_title}")
   278→        click.echo(f"URL: {result.url}")
   279→        click.echo(f"Branch: {branch_name}")
   280→        if snapshot_result is not None:
   281→            click.echo(f"Archived: {snapshot_result.snapshot_dir}")
   282→        click.echo()
   283→        click.echo(
   284→            format_planned_pr_next_steps_plain(plan_number, branch_name=branch_name, url=result.url)
   285→        )
   286→    else:
   287→        output_data: dict[str, str | int | bool | None] = {
   288→            "success": True,
   289→            "plan_number": plan_number,
   290→            "plan_url": result.url,
   291→            "title": prefixed_title,
   292→            "branch_name": branch_name,
   293→            "plan_backend": "planned_pr",
   294→        }
   295→        if snapshot_result is not None:
   296→            output_data["archived_to"] = str(snapshot_result.snapshot_dir)
   297→        click.echo(json.dumps(output_data))
   298→
   299→
   300→def _save_plan_via_planned_pr(
   301→    ctx: click.Context,
   302→    *,
   303→    output_format: str,
   304→    plan_file: Path | None,
   305→    session_id: str | None,
   306→    objective_issue: int | None,
   307→    plan_type: str | None,
   308→    learned_from_issue: int | None,
   309→    created_from_workflow_run_url: str | None,
   310→    branch_slug: str | None,
   311→) -> None:
   312→    """Handle planned-PR backend: dedup check, plan extraction, validation, and save.
   313→
   314→    Args:
   315→        ctx: Click context
   316→        output_format: Output format (json or display)
   317→        plan_file: Explicit plan file path (highest priority)
   318→        session_id: Session ID for dedup and markers
   319→        objective_issue: Optional objective issue number
   320→        plan_type: Plan type (standard or learn)
   321→        learned_from_issue: Parent plan issue number (for learn plans)
   322→        created_from_workflow_run_url: GitHub Actions workflow run URL
   323→        branch_slug: Pre-generated branch slug (skips LLM call when provided)
   324→    """
   325→    repo_root = require_repo_root(ctx)
   326→    cwd = require_cwd(ctx)
   327→    claude_installation = require_claude_installation(ctx)
   328→
   329→    # Session deduplication check
   330→    if session_id is not None:
   331→        existing_issue = get_existing_saved_issue(session_id, repo_root)
   332→        if existing_issue is not None:
   333→            existing_branch = get_existing_saved_branch(session_id, repo_root)
   334→            if output_format == "display":
   335→                click.echo(
   336→                    f"This session already saved plan #{existing_issue}. "
   337→                    "Skipping duplicate creation.",
   338→                    err=True,
   339→                )
   340→            else:
   341→                dedup_response = {
   342→                    "success": True,
   343→                    "plan_number": existing_issue,
   344→                    "skipped_duplicate": True,
   345→                    "message": f"Session already saved plan #{existing_issue}",
   346→                    "plan_backend": "planned_pr",
   347→                }
   348→                if existing_branch is not None:
   349→                    dedup_response["branch_name"] = existing_branch
   350→                click.echo(json.dumps(dedup_response))
   351→            return
   352→
   353→    # Extract plan content (same priority as plan-save-to-issue)
   354→    plan = resolve_plan_content(
   355→        plan_file=plan_file,
   356→        session_id=session_id,
   357→        repo_root=repo_root,
   358→        claude_installation=claude_installation,
   359→        cwd=cwd,
   360→    )
   361→
   362→    if not plan:
   363→        if output_format == "display":
   364→            click.echo("Error: No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/", err=True)
   365→        else:
   366→            click.echo(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": "No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/"}))
   367→        raise SystemExit(1)
   368→
   369→    # Validate plan content
   370→    valid, error, details = _validate_plan_content(plan)
   371→    if not valid:
   372→        if output_format == "display":
   373→            click.echo(f"Error: Plan validation failed: {error}", err=True)
   374→        else:
   375→            click.echo(
   376→                json.dumps(
   377→                    {
   378→                        "success": False,
   379→                        "error": f"Plan validation failed: {error}",
   380→                        "error_type": "validation_failed",
   381→                        "details": details,
   382→                    }
   383→                )
   384→            )
   385→        raise SystemExit(2)
   386→
   387→    _save_as_planned_pr(
   388→        ctx,
   389→        plan_content=plan,
   390→        session_id=session_id,
   391→        objective_issue=objective_issue,
   392→        plan_type=plan_type,
   393→        output_format=output_format,
   394→        plan_file=plan_file,
   395→        learned_from_issue=learned_from_issue,
   396→        created_from_workflow_run_url=created_from_workflow_run_url,
   397→        branch_slug=branch_slug,
   398→    )
   399→
   400→
   401→@click.command(name="plan-save")
   402→@click.option(
   403→    "--format",
   404→    "output_format",
   405→    type=click.Choice(["json", "display"]),
   406→    default="json",
   407→    help="Output format: json (default) or display (formatted text)",
   408→)
   409→@click.option(
   410→    "--plan-file",
   411→    type=click.Path(exists=True, path_type=Path),
   412→    default=None,
   413→    help="Path to specific plan file (highest priority)",
   414→)
   415→@click.option(
   416→    "--session-id",
   417→    default=None,
   418→    help="Session ID for scoped plan lookup",
   419→)
   420→@click.option(
   421→    "--objective-issue",
   422→    type=int,
   423→    default=None,
   424→    help="Link plan to parent objective issue number",
   425→)
   426→@click.option(
   427→    "--plan-type",
   428→    type=click.Choice(["standard", "learn"]),
   429→    default=None,
   430→    help="Plan type: standard (default) or learn",
   431→)
   432→@click.option(
   433→    "--learned-from-issue",
   434→    type=int,
   435→    default=None,
   436→    help="Parent plan issue number (for learn plans)",
   437→)
   438→@click.option(
   439→    "--created-from-workflow-run-url",
   440→    default=None,
   441→    help="GitHub Actions workflow run URL",
   442→)
   443→@click.option(
   444→    "--branch-slug",
   445→    default=None,
   446→    help="Pre-generated branch slug (skips LLM call when provided)",
   447→)
   448→@click.pass_context
   449→def plan_save(
   450→    ctx: click.Context,
   451→    *,
   452→    output_format: str,
   453→    plan_file: Path | None,
   454→    session_id: str | None,
   455→    objective_issue: int | None,
   456→    plan_type: str | None,
   457→    learned_from_issue: int | None,
   458→    created_from_workflow_run_url: str | None,
   459→    branch_slug: str | None,
   460→) -> None:
   461→    """Save plan as a draft PR."""
   462→    _save_plan_via_planned_pr(
   463→        ctx,
   464→        output_format=output_format,
   465→        plan_file=plan_file,
   466→        session_id=session_id,
   467→        objective_issue=objective_issue,
   468→        plan_type=plan_type,
   469→        learned_from_issue=learned_from_issue,
   470→        created_from_workflow_run_url=created_from_workflow_run_url,
   471→        branch_slug=branch_slug,
   472→    )
   473→

file.content:
"""Plan save: creates a draft PR with the plan content.

Usage:
    erk exec plan-save [OPTIONS]

Options:
    --format json|display: Output format (default: json)
    --plan-file PATH: Use specific plan file (highest priority)
    --session-id ID: Session ID for scoped plan lookup
    --objective-issue INT: Link plan to parent objective
    --plan-type standard|learn: Plan type (default: standard)
    --learned-from-issue INT: Parent plan issue (for learn plans)
    --created-from-workflow-run-url URL: Workflow run URL

Exit Codes:
    0: Success
    1: Error
    2: Validation failed
"""

import json
from pathlib import Path

import click

from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.validate_plan_content import _validate_plan_content
from erk_shared.context.helpers import (
    get_repo_identifier,
    require_branch_manager,
    require_claude_installation,
    require_cwd,
    require_git,
    require_github,
    require_issues,
    require_local_config,
    require_repo_root,
    require_time,
)
from erk_shared.gateway.claude_installation.abc import ClaudeInstallation
from erk_shared.gateway.git.branch_ops.types import BranchAlreadyExists
from erk_shared.gateway.time.real import RealTime
from erk_shared.naming import (
    InvalidPlanTitle,
    generate_planned_pr_branch_name,
    validate_plan_title,
)
from erk_shared.output.next_steps import format_planned_pr_next_steps_plain
from erk_shared.plan_store.plan_content import extract_title_from_plan, resolve_plan_content
from erk_shared.plan_store.planned_pr import PlannedPRBackend
from erk_shared.plan_store.planned_pr_lifecycle import IMPL_CONTEXT_DIR
from erk_shared.plan_utils import get_title_tag_from_labels
from erk_shared.scratch.plan_snapshots import PlanSnapshot, snapshot_plan_for_session
from erk_shared.scratch.session_markers import (
    create_plan_saved_branch_marker,
    create_plan_saved_issue_marker,
    create_plan_saved_marker,
    get_existing_saved_branch,
    get_existing_saved_issue,
)


def _get_snapshot_result(
    *,
    session_id: str,
    plan_file: Path | None,
    cwd: Path,
    claude_installation: ClaudeInstallation,
    repo_root: Path,
) -> PlanSnapshot | None:
    """Archive the plan file to session-scoped scratch storage.

    Plan snapshots preserve the original plan content at save time, creating
    an immutable record tied to the session. This enables deduplication
    (detecting if a session already saved a plan) and provides an audit trail
    (what was the plan content when it was saved).

    Args:
        session_id: Claude session ID
        plan_file: Explicit plan file path (highest priority)
        cwd: Current working directory
        claude_installation: ClaudeInstallation gateway for plan discovery
        repo_root: Repository root for scratch directory

    Returns:
        PlanSnapshot with archive path, or None if no plan file found.
    """
    if plan_file is not None:
        snapshot_path = plan_file
    else:
        snapshot_path = claude_installation.find_plan_for_session(cwd, session_id)

    if snapshot_path is None or not snapshot_path.exists():
        return None

    return snapshot_plan_for_session(
        session_id=session_id,
        plan_file_path=snapshot_path,
        project_cwd=cwd,
        claude_installation=claude_installation,
        repo_root=repo_root,
    )


def _save_as_planned_pr(
    ctx: click.Context,
    *,
    plan_content: str,
    session_id: str | None,
    objective_issue: int | None,
    plan_type: str | None,
    output_format: str,
    plan_file: Path | None,
    learned_from_issue: int | None,
    created_from_workflow_run_url: str | None,
    branch_slug: str | None,
) -> None:
    """Save plan as a planned PR.

    Creates a branch, pushes it, then creates a planned PR with plan content.

    Args:
        ctx: Click context
        plan_content: Validated plan content
        session_id: Session ID for markers
        objective_issue: Optional objective issue number
        plan_type: Plan type (standard or learn)
        output_format: Output format (json or display)
        plan_file: Original plan file path (for snapshot)
        learned_from_issue: Parent plan issue number (for learn plans)
        created_from_workflow_run_url: GitHub Actions workflow run URL
        branch_slug: Pre-generated branch slug (skips LLM call when provided)
    """
    repo_root = require_repo_root(ctx)
    cwd = require_cwd(ctx)
    git = require_git(ctx)
    github = require_github(ctx)
    github_issues = require_issues(ctx)
    config = require_local_config(ctx)
    claude_installation = require_claude_installation(ctx)

    title = extract_title_from_plan(plan_content)

    # Validate plan title before proceeding
    title_validation = validate_plan_title(title)
    if isinstance(title_validation, InvalidPlanTitle):
        if output_format == "display":
            click.echo(f"Error: {title_validation.message}", err=True)
        else:
            click.echo(
                json.dumps(
                    {
                        "success": False,
                        "error": f"Plan title validation failed: {title_validation.reason}",
                        "error_type": "validation_failed",
                        "agent_guidance": title_validation.message,
                    }
                )
            )
        raise SystemExit(2)

    if not branch_slug:
        click.echo(
            "Error: --branch-slug is required. "
            "Generate a slug in the calling skill (e.g., plan-save.md Step 1.5) "
            "and pass it via --branch-slug.",
            err=True,
        )
        raise SystemExit(1)
    slug = branch_slug
    now = require_time(ctx).now()
    branch_name = generate_planned_pr_branch_name(
        slug,
        now,
        objective_id=objective_issue,
    )

    # Determine base branch: use current branch if on a feature branch, otherwise trunk
    branch_manager = require_branch_manager(ctx)
    trunk = git.branch.detect_trunk_branch(repo_root)
    current_branch = git.branch.get_current_branch(repo_root)

    if current_branch is not None and current_branch != trunk:
        # Stack plan branch on current feature branch for natural Graphite stacking
        base_branch = current_branch
        create_result = branch_manager.create_branch(repo_root, branch_name, current_branch)
    else:
        # On trunk or detached HEAD: create from origin/trunk
        base_branch = trunk
        git.remote.fetch_branch(repo_root, "origin", trunk)
        create_result = branch_manager.create_branch(repo_root, branch_name, f"origin/{trunk}")
    if isinstance(create_result, BranchAlreadyExists):
        click.echo(f"Error: {create_result.message}", err=True)
        raise SystemExit(1) from None

    # Build ref.json data
    ref_data: dict[str, str | int | None] = {
        "provider": "github-draft-pr",
        "title": title,
    }
    if objective_issue is not None:
        ref_data["objective_id"] = objective_issue

    # Commit plan files directly to branch (no checkout needed).
    # Uses git plumbing to avoid race conditions when multiple sessions
    # share the same worktree.
    git.commit.commit_files_to_branch(
        repo_root,
        branch=branch_name,
        files={
            f"{IMPL_CONTEXT_DIR}/plan.md": plan_content,
            f"{IMPL_CONTEXT_DIR}/ref.json": json.dumps(ref_data, indent=2),
        },
        message=f"Add plan: {title}",
    )
    git.remote.push_to_remote(cwd, "origin", branch_name, set_upstream=True, force=False)

    # Build metadata — base_ref_name sets the PR base ref
    metadata: dict[str, object] = {"branch_name": branch_name, "base_ref_name": base_branch}

    if config.plans_repo is not None:
        metadata["source_repo"] = get_repo_identifier(ctx)

    if objective_issue is not None:
        metadata["objective_issue"] = objective_issue

    if session_id is not None:
        metadata["created_from_session"] = session_id

    if learned_from_issue is not None:
        metadata["learned_from_issue"] = learned_from_issue

    if created_from_workflow_run_url is not None:
        metadata["created_from_workflow_run_url"] = created_from_workflow_run_url

    # Build labels
    labels = ["erk-plan"]
    if plan_type == "learn":
        labels.append("erk-learn")

    # Prefix title with [erk-plan] or [erk-learn] for GitHub visibility
    title_tag = get_title_tag_from_labels(labels)
    prefixed_title = f"{title_tag} {title}"

    # Create draft PR via backend
    backend = PlannedPRBackend(github, github_issues, time=RealTime())
    result = backend.create_plan(
        repo_root=repo_root,
        title=prefixed_title,
        content=plan_content,
        labels=tuple(labels),
        metadata=metadata,
    )

    if not result.plan_id.isdigit():
        msg = f"Expected numeric plan_id from planned PR creation, got: {result.plan_id!r}"
        raise RuntimeError(msg)
    plan_number = int(result.plan_id)

    # Create markers and snapshot
    snapshot_result: PlanSnapshot | None = None
    if session_id is not None:
        create_plan_saved_marker(session_id, repo_root)
        create_plan_saved_issue_marker(session_id, repo_root, plan_number)
        create_plan_saved_branch_marker(session_id, repo_root, branch_name)

        snapshot_result = _get_snapshot_result(
            session_id=session_id,
            plan_file=plan_file,
            cwd=cwd,
            claude_installation=claude_installation,
            repo_root=repo_root,
        )

    # Output
    if output_format == "display":
        click.echo(f"Plan saved as planned PR #{plan_number}")
        click.echo(f"Title: {prefixed_title}")
        click.echo(f"URL: {result.url}")
        click.echo(f"Branch: {branch_name}")
        if snapshot_result is not None:
            click.echo(f"Archived: {snapshot_result.snapshot_dir}")
        click.echo()
        click.echo(
            format_planned_pr_next_steps_plain(plan_number, branch_name=branch_name, url=result.url)
        )
    else:
        output_data: dict[str, str | int | bool | None] = {
            "success": True,
            "plan_number": plan_number,
            "plan_url": result.url,
            "title": prefixed_title,
            "branch_name": branch_name,
            "plan_backend": "planned_pr",
        }
        if snapshot_result is not None:
            output_data["archived_to"] = str(snapshot_result.snapshot_dir)
        click.echo(json.dumps(output_data))


def _save_plan_via_planned_pr(
    ctx: click.Context,
    *,
    output_format: str,
    plan_file: Path | None,
    session_id: str | None,
    objective_issue: int | None,
    plan_type: str | None,
    learned_from_issue: int | None,
    created_from_workflow_run_url: str | None,
    branch_slug: str | None,
) -> None:
    """Handle planned-PR backend: dedup check, plan extraction, validation, and save.

    Args:
        ctx: Click context
        output_format: Output format (json or display)
        plan_file: Explicit plan file path (highest priority)
        session_id: Session ID for dedup and markers
        objective_issue: Optional objective issue number
        plan_type: Plan type (standard or learn)
        learned_from_issue: Parent plan issue number (for learn plans)
        created_from_workflow_run_url: GitHub Actions workflow run URL
        branch_slug: Pre-generated branch slug (skips LLM call when provided)
    """
    repo_root = require_repo_root(ctx)
    cwd = require_cwd(ctx)
    claude_installation = require_claude_installation(ctx)

    # Session deduplication check
    if session_id is not None:
        existing_issue = get_existing_saved_issue(session_id, repo_root)
        if existing_issue is not None:
            existing_branch = get_existing_saved_branch(session_id, repo_root)
            if output_format == "display":
                click.echo(
                    f"This session already saved plan #{existing_issue}. "
                    "Skipping duplicate creation.",
                    err=True,
                )
            else:
                dedup_response = {
                    "success": True,
                    "plan_number": existing_issue,
                    "skipped_duplicate": True,
                    "message": f"Session already saved plan #{existing_issue}",
                    "plan_backend": "planned_pr",
                }
                if existing_branch is not None:
                    dedup_response["branch_name"] = existing_branch
                click.echo(json.dumps(dedup_response))
            return

    # Extract plan content (same priority as plan-save-to-issue)
    plan = resolve_plan_content(
        plan_file=plan_file,
        session_id=session_id,
        repo_root=repo_root,
        claude_installation=claude_installation,
        cwd=cwd,
    )

    if not plan:
        if output_format == "display":
            click.echo("Error: No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/", err=True)
        else:
            click.echo(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": "No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/"}))
        raise SystemExit(1)

    # Validate plan content
    valid, error, details = _validate_plan_content(plan)
    if not valid:
        if output_format == "display":
            click.echo(f"Error: Plan validation failed: {error}", err=True)
        else:
            click.echo(
                json.dumps(
                    {
                        "success": False,
                        "error": f"Plan validation failed: {error}",
                        "error_type": "validation_failed",
                        "details": details,
                    }
                )
            )
        raise SystemExit(2)

    _save_as_planned_pr(
        ctx,
        plan_content=plan,
        session_id=session_id,
        objective_issue=objective_issue,
        plan_type=plan_type,
        output_format=output_format,
        plan_file=plan_file,
        learned_from_issue=learned_from_issue,
        created_from_workflow_run_url=created_from_workflow_run_url,
        branch_slug=branch_slug,
    )


@click.command(name="plan-save")
@click.option(
    "--format",
    "output_format",
    type=click.Choice(["json", "display"]),
    default="json",
    help="Output format: json (default) or display (formatted text)",
)
@click.option(
    "--plan-file",
    type=click.Path(exists=True, path_type=Path),
    default=None,
    help="Path to specific plan file (highest priority)",
)
@click.option(
    "--session-id",
    default=None,
    help="Session ID for scoped plan lookup",
)
@click.option(
    "--objective-issue",
    type=int,
    default=None,
    help="Link plan to parent objective issue number",
)
@click.option(
    "--plan-type",
    type=click.Choice(["standard", "learn"]),
    default=None,
    help="Plan type: standard (default) or learn",
)
@click.option(
    "--learned-from-issue",
    type=int,
    default=None,
    help="Parent plan issue number (for learn plans)",
)
@click.option(
    "--created-from-workflow-run-url",
    default=None,
    help="GitHub Actions workflow run URL",
)
@click.option(
    "--branch-slug",
    default=None,
    help="Pre-generated branch slug (skips LLM call when provided)",
)
@click.pass_context
def plan_save(
    ctx: click.Context,
    *,
    output_format: str,
    plan_file: Path | None,
    session_id: str | None,
    objective_issue: int | None,
    plan_type: str | None,
    learned_from_issue: int | None,
    created_from_workflow_run_url: str | None,
    branch_slug: str | None,
) -> None:
    """Save plan as a draft PR."""
    _save_plan_via_planned_pr(
        ctx,
        output_format=output_format,
        plan_file=plan_file,
        session_id=session_id,
        objective_issue=objective_issue,
        plan_type=plan_type,
        learned_from_issue=learned_from_issue,
        created_from_workflow_run_url=created_from_workflow_run_url,
        branch_slug=branch_slug,
    )

   100→@click.pass_context
   101→def plan_save_to_issue(

   123→    effective_session_id = session_id
   124→
   125→    # Step 0: Session deduplication check
   126→    # Prevent duplicate plan creation when the agent calls plan-save multiple times
   127→    # in the same session (e.g., due to exit-plan-mode-hook loop bug)
   128→    if effective_session_id is not None:

   136→                )

   151→    plan = resolve_plan_content(
   152→        plan_file=plan_file,
   153→        session_id=effective_session_id,

   156→        cwd=cwd,
   157→    )
   158→
   159→    if not plan:
   160→        if output_format == "display":
   161→            click.echo("Error: No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/", err=True)
   162→            click.echo("\nTo fix:", err=True)
   163→            click.echo("1. Create a plan (enter Plan mode if needed)", err=True)
   164→            click.echo("2. Exit Plan mode using ExitPlanMode tool", err=True)
   165→            click.echo("3. Run this command again", err=True)
   166→        else:
   167→            click.echo(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": "No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/"}))
   168→        raise SystemExit(1)
   169→
   170→    # Validate plan content before creating issue
   171→    valid, error, details = _validate_plan_content(plan)

   173→        if output_format == "display":
   174→            click.echo(f"Error: Plan validation failed: {error}", err=True)

   176→            click.echo(
   177→                json.dumps(
   178→                    {
   179→                        "success": False,
   180→                        "error": f"Plan validation failed: {error}",
   181→                        "error_type": "validation_failed",
   182→                        "details": details,
   183→                    }
   184→                )
   185→            )

   187→
   188→    # Validate plan title before creating issue
   189→    title = extract_title_from_plan(plan)
   190→    title_validation = validate_plan_title(title)
   191→    if isinstance(title_validation, InvalidPlanTitle):
   192→        if output_format == "display":
   193→            click.echo(f"Error: {title_validation.message}", err=True)
   194→        else:
   195→            click.echo(
   196→                json.dumps(
   197→                    {
   198→                        "success": False,
   199→                        "error": f"Plan title validation failed: {title_validation.reason}",
   200→                        "error_type": "validation_failed",
   201→                        "agent_guidance": title_validation.message,
   202→                    }
   203→                )
   204→            )
   205→        raise SystemExit(2)
   206→
   207→    # Auto-link to objective from session context marker (fallback)
   208→    if objective_issue is None and effective_session_id is not None:

   210→        if marker_value is not None:

   218→    # When plans_repo is configured, plans are stored in a separate repo

   227→    if plan_type == "learn":

   241→        created_from_workflow_run_url=created_from_workflow_run_url,
   242→        learned_from_issue=learned_from_issue,

   244→    )
   245→
   246→    if not result.success:
   247→        if result.issue_number is not None:

   249→            if output_format == "display":

   251→                click.echo(f"Please manually add plan content to: {result.issue_url}", err=True)
   252→            else:
   253→                click.echo(
   254→                    json.dumps(
   255→                        {
   256→                            "success": False,
   257→                            "error": result.error,
   258→                            "plan_number": result.issue_number,
   259→                            "plan_url": result.issue_url,
   260→                        }
   261→                    )
   262→                )
   263→        else:
   264→            if output_format == "display":
   265→                click.echo(f"Error: {result.error}", err=True)
   266→            else:
   267→                click.echo(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": result.error}))
   268→        raise SystemExit(1)
   269→
   270→    # Step 9: Create marker files to indicate plan was saved
   271→    snapshot_result = None
   272→    if effective_session_id:
   273→        create_plan_saved_marker(effective_session_id, repo_root)
   274→
   275→        # Step 9.0.1: Also store the issue number in a separate marker
   276→        # This enables automatic plan updates - when user says "update plan",
   277→        # Claude can read this marker to find the issue number
   278→        if result.issue_number is not None:
   279→            create_plan_saved_issue_marker(effective_session_id, repo_root, result.issue_number)
   280→
   281→        # Step 9.0.2: Upload session exchanges as a metadata block comment
   282→        # Each exchange pairs a user prompt with the preceding assistant message
   283→        # for context (e.g., understanding what "yes" was responding to)
   284→        if result.issue_number is not None:
   285→            session_content = claude_installation.read_session(
   286→                cwd,
   287→                effective_session_id,
   288→                include_agents=False,
   289→            )
   290→            if session_content is not None:
   291→                exchanges = extract_session_exchanges_from_jsonl(
   292→                    session_content.main_content,
   293→                    max_exchanges=20,
   294→                    max_text_length=500,
   295→                )
   296→                if exchanges:
   297→                    # Convert SessionExchange objects to tuples for render function
   298→                    exchange_tuples = [(ex.preceding_assistant, ex.user_prompt) for ex in exchanges]
   299→                    exchanges_block = render_session_exchanges_block(
   300→                        exchange_tuples,
   301→                        max_text_display_length=500,
   302→                    )
   303→                    github.add_comment(repo_root, result.issue_number, exchanges_block)
   304→
   305→        # Step 9.1: Snapshot the plan file to session-scoped storage
   306→        # Determine plan file path
   307→        if plan_file:
   308→            snapshot_path = plan_file
   309→        else:
   310→            # Look up slug from session to find plan file
   311→            snapshot_path = claude_installation.find_plan_for_session(cwd, effective_session_id)
   312→
   313→        if snapshot_path is not None and snapshot_path.exists():
   314→            snapshot_result = snapshot_plan_for_session(
   315→                session_id=effective_session_id,
   316→                plan_file_path=snapshot_path,
   317→                project_cwd=cwd,
   318→                claude_installation=claude_installation,
   319→                repo_root=repo_root,
   320→            )
   321→            # NOTE: Plan file deletion moved to impl_signal.py on 'started' event
   322→            # This allows the user to modify and re-save the plan before implementing
   323→
   324→    # Step 10: Output success
   325→    # At this point result.success is True, so issue_number must be set
   326→    # Guard for type narrowing
   327→    if result.issue_number is None:
   328→        raise RuntimeError("Unexpected: issue_number is None after successful create_plan_issue")
   329→    if result.issue_url is None:
   330→        raise RuntimeError("Unexpected: issue_url is None after successful create_plan_issue")
   331→
   332→    if output_format == "display":
   333→        click.echo(f"Plan saved to GitHub issue #{result.issue_number}")
   334→        click.echo(f"Title: {result.title}")
   335→        click.echo(f"URL: {result.issue_url}")
   336→        if snapshot_result is not None:
   337→            click.echo(f"Archived: {snapshot_result.snapshot_dir}")
   338→        click.echo()
   339→        click.echo(format_next_steps_plain(result.issue_number, url=result.issue_url))
   340→    else:
   341→        output_data: dict[str, str | int | bool | None] = {
   342→            "success": True,
   343→            "plan_number": result.issue_number,
   344→            "plan_url": result.issue_url,
   345→            "title": result.title,
   346→            "plan_backend": "github",
   347→        }
   348→        if snapshot_result is not None:
   349→            output_data["archived_to"] = str(snapshot_result.snapshot_dir)
   350→        click.echo(json.dumps(output_data))
   351→

"""Extract plan from ~/.claude/plans/ and create GitHub issue in one operation.

Usage:
    erk exec plan-save-to-issue [OPTIONS]

This command combines plan extraction and issue creation:
1. Extract plan from specified file, session-scoped lookup, or latest from ~/.claude/plans/
2. Validate plan content meets minimum requirements
3. Create GitHub issue with plan content

Options:
    --plan-file PATH: Use specific plan file (highest priority)
    --session-id ID: Use session-scoped lookup to find plan by slug
    (neither): Fall back to most recent plan by modification time

Output:
    --format json (default): {"success": true, "issue_number": N, ...}
    --format display: Formatted text ready for display

Exit Codes:
    0: Success - plan extracted and issue created
    1: Error - no plan found, gh failure, etc.
    2: Validation failed - plan empty, too short, or lacks structure
"""

import json
from pathlib import Path

import click

from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.validate_plan_content import _validate_plan_content
from erk_shared.context.helpers import (
    get_repo_identifier,
    require_claude_installation,
    require_cwd,
    require_local_config,
    require_repo_root,
)
from erk_shared.context.helpers import (
    require_issues as require_github_issues,
)
from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.session import render_session_exchanges_block
from erk_shared.gateway.github.plan_issues import create_plan_issue
from erk_shared.learn.extraction.session_schema import extract_session_exchanges_from_jsonl
from erk_shared.naming import InvalidPlanTitle, validate_plan_title
from erk_shared.output.next_steps import format_next_steps_plain
from erk_shared.plan_store.plan_content import resolve_plan_content
from erk_shared.plan_utils import extract_title_from_plan
from erk_shared.scratch.plan_snapshots import snapshot_plan_for_session
from erk_shared.scratch.session_markers import (
    create_plan_saved_issue_marker,
    create_plan_saved_marker,
    get_existing_saved_issue,
    read_objective_context_marker,
)


@click.command(name="plan-save-to-issue")
@click.option(
    "--format",
    "output_format",
    type=click.Choice(["json", "display"]),
    default="json",
    help="Output format: json (default) or display (formatted text)",
)
@click.option(
    "--plan-file",
    type=click.Path(exists=True, path_type=Path),
    default=None,
    help="Path to specific plan file (highest priority)",
)
@click.option(
    "--session-id",
    default=None,
    help="Session ID for scoped plan lookup (uses slug from session logs)",
)
@click.option(
    "--objective-issue",
    type=int,
    default=None,
    help="Link plan to parent objective issue number",
)
@click.option(
    "--plan-type",
    type=click.Choice(["standard", "learn"]),
    default=None,
    help="Plan type: standard (default) or learn (for documentation learning plans)",
)
@click.option(
    "--learned-from-issue",
    type=int,
    default=None,
    help="Parent plan issue number (for learn plans, enables auto-update on land)",
)
@click.option(
    "--created-from-workflow-run-url",
    default=None,
    help="GitHub Actions workflow run URL that created this plan (for backlink)",
)
@click.pass_context
def plan_save_to_issue(
    ctx: click.Context,
    *,
    output_format: str,
    plan_file: Path | None,
    session_id: str | None,
    objective_issue: int | None,
    plan_type: str | None,
    learned_from_issue: int | None,
    created_from_workflow_run_url: str | None,
) -> None:
    """Extract plan from ~/.claude/plans/ and create GitHub issue.

    Combines plan extraction and issue creation in a single operation.
    """
    # Get dependencies from context
    github = require_github_issues(ctx)
    repo_root = require_repo_root(ctx)
    cwd = require_cwd(ctx)
    claude_installation = require_claude_installation(ctx)

    # session_id comes from --session-id CLI option (or None if not provided)
    effective_session_id = session_id

    # Step 0: Session deduplication check
    # Prevent duplicate plan creation when the agent calls plan-save multiple times
    # in the same session (e.g., due to exit-plan-mode-hook loop bug)
    if effective_session_id is not None:
        existing_issue = get_existing_saved_issue(effective_session_id, repo_root)
        if existing_issue is not None:
            if output_format == "display":
                click.echo(
                    f"This session already saved plan #{existing_issue}. "
                    "Skipping duplicate creation.",
                    err=True,
                )
            else:
                click.echo(
                    json.dumps(
                        {
                            "success": True,
                            "plan_number": existing_issue,
                            "skipped_duplicate": True,
                            "message": f"Session already saved plan #{existing_issue}",
                        }
                    )
                )
            return

    # Step 1: Extract plan (priority: plan_file > scratch directory > Claude plans directory)
    plan = resolve_plan_content(
        plan_file=plan_file,
        session_id=effective_session_id,
        repo_root=repo_root,
        claude_installation=claude_installation,
        cwd=cwd,
    )

    if not plan:
        if output_format == "display":
            click.echo("Error: No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/", err=True)
            click.echo("\nTo fix:", err=True)
            click.echo("1. Create a plan (enter Plan mode if needed)", err=True)
            click.echo("2. Exit Plan mode using ExitPlanMode tool", err=True)
            click.echo("3. Run this command again", err=True)
        else:
            click.echo(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": "No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/"}))
        raise SystemExit(1)

    # Validate plan content before creating issue
    valid, error, details = _validate_plan_content(plan)
    if not valid:
        if output_format == "display":
            click.echo(f"Error: Plan validation failed: {error}", err=True)
        else:
            click.echo(
                json.dumps(
                    {
                        "success": False,
                        "error": f"Plan validation failed: {error}",
                        "error_type": "validation_failed",
                        "details": details,
                    }
                )
            )
        raise SystemExit(2)

    # Validate plan title before creating issue
    title = extract_title_from_plan(plan)
    title_validation = validate_plan_title(title)
    if isinstance(title_validation, InvalidPlanTitle):
        if output_format == "display":
            click.echo(f"Error: {title_validation.message}", err=True)
        else:
            click.echo(
                json.dumps(
                    {
                        "success": False,
                        "error": f"Plan title validation failed: {title_validation.reason}",
                        "error_type": "validation_failed",
                        "agent_guidance": title_validation.message,
                    }
                )
            )
        raise SystemExit(2)

    # Auto-link to objective from session context marker (fallback)
    if objective_issue is None and effective_session_id is not None:
        marker_value = read_objective_context_marker(effective_session_id, repo_root)
        if marker_value is not None:
            objective_issue = marker_value
            click.echo(
                f"Auto-linked to objective #{marker_value} from session context",
                err=True,
            )

    # Determine source_repo for cross-repo plans
    # When plans_repo is configured, plans are stored in a separate repo
    # and source_repo records where implementation will happen
    source_repo: str | None = None
    config = require_local_config(ctx)
    if config.plans_repo is not None:
        source_repo = get_repo_identifier(ctx)

    # Convert plan_type to extra_labels (erk-learn label indicates learn plans)
    extra_labels: list[str] | None = None
    if plan_type == "learn":
        extra_labels = ["erk-learn"]

    # Use consolidated create_plan_issue for the entire workflow
    result = create_plan_issue(
        github_issues=github,
        repo_root=repo_root,
        plan_content=plan,
        title=title,
        extra_labels=extra_labels,
        title_tag=None,
        source_repo=source_repo,
        objective_id=objective_issue,
        created_from_session=effective_session_id,
        created_from_workflow_run_url=created_from_workflow_run_url,
        learned_from_issue=learned_from_issue,
        lifecycle_stage="planned",
    )

    if not result.success:
        if result.issue_number is not None:
            # Partial success - issue created but comment failed
            if output_format == "display":
                click.echo(f"Warning: {result.error}", err=True)
                click.echo(f"Please manually add plan content to: {result.issue_url}", err=True)
            else:
                click.echo(
                    json.dumps(
                        {
                            "success": False,
                            "error": result.error,
                            "plan_number": result.issue_number,
                            "plan_url": result.issue_url,
                        }
                    )
                )
        else:
            if output_format == "display":
                click.echo(f"Error: {result.error}", err=True)
            else:
                click.echo(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": result.error}))
        raise SystemExit(1)

    # Step 9: Create marker files to indicate plan was saved
    snapshot_result = None
    if effective_session_id:
        create_plan_saved_marker(effective_session_id, repo_root)

        # Step 9.0.1: Also store the issue number in a separate marker
        # This enables automatic plan updates - when user says "update plan",
        # Claude can read this marker to find the issue number
        if result.issue_number is not None:
            create_plan_saved_issue_marker(effective_session_id, repo_root, result.issue_number)

        # Step 9.0.2: Upload session exchanges as a metadata block comment
        # Each exchange pairs a user prompt with the preceding assistant message
        # for context (e.g., understanding what "yes" was responding to)
        if result.issue_number is not None:
            session_content = claude_installation.read_session(
                cwd,
                effective_session_id,
                include_agents=False,
            )
            if session_content is not None:
                exchanges = extract_session_exchanges_from_jsonl(
                    session_content.main_content,
                    max_exchanges=20,
                    max_text_length=500,
                )
                if exchanges:
                    # Convert SessionExchange objects to tuples for render function
                    exchange_tuples = [(ex.preceding_assistant, ex.user_prompt) for ex in exchanges]
                    exchanges_block = render_session_exchanges_block(
                        exchange_tuples,
                        max_text_display_length=500,
                    )
                    github.add_comment(repo_root, result.issue_number, exchanges_block)

        # Step 9.1: Snapshot the plan file to session-scoped storage
        # Determine plan file path
        if plan_file:
            snapshot_path = plan_file
        else:
            # Look up slug from session to find plan file
            snapshot_path = claude_installation.find_plan_for_session(cwd, effective_session_id)

        if snapshot_path is not None and snapshot_path.exists():
            snapshot_result = snapshot_plan_for_session(
                session_id=effective_session_id,
                plan_file_path=snapshot_path,
                project_cwd=cwd,
                claude_installation=claude_installation,
                repo_root=repo_root,
            )
            # NOTE: Plan file deletion moved to impl_signal.py on 'started' event
            # This allows the user to modify and re-save the plan before implementing

    # Step 10: Output success
    # At this point result.success is True, so issue_number must be set
    # Guard for type narrowing
    if result.issue_number is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Unexpected: issue_number is None after successful create_plan_issue")
    if result.issue_url is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Unexpected: issue_url is None after successful create_plan_issue")

    if output_format == "display":
        click.echo(f"Plan saved to GitHub issue #{result.issue_number}")
        click.echo(f"Title: {result.title}")
        click.echo(f"URL: {result.issue_url}")
        if snapshot_result is not None:
            click.echo(f"Archived: {snapshot_result.snapshot_dir}")
        click.echo()
        click.echo(format_next_steps_plain(result.issue_number, url=result.issue_url))
    else:
        output_data: dict[str, str | int | bool | None] = {
            "success": True,
            "plan_number": result.issue_number,
            "plan_url": result.issue_url,
            "title": result.title,
            "plan_backend": "github",
        }
        if snapshot_result is not None:
            output_data["archived_to"] = str(snapshot_result.snapshot_dir)
        click.echo(json.dumps(output_data))
